function.name: diff_traces
function.description: Compare two redline JSONL trace files to detect behavioral regressions. Returns a DiffResult with the first fork point (divergent step), per-step alignment, and summary statistics. Use this to check whether a prompt change, model upgrade, or tool swap changed how an agent reasons.

trace_a_content.description: Full content of the baseline JSONL trace file (one JSON object per line)

trace_b_content.description: Full content of the candidate JSONL trace file (one JSON object per line)

fork_threshold.description: Cosine similarity below this value marks a fork point. Default: 0.70

match_threshold.description: Cosine similarity above this value is considered a match. Default: 0.85

function.name: inspect_trace
function.description: Summarise a single redline JSONL trace file. Returns the run_id, total node and edge count, and a step-by-step breakdown with node type and content preview for each step.

trace_content.description: Full content of the JSONL trace file to inspect (one JSON object per line)

function.name: record_snippet
function.description: Return a ready-to-paste Python code snippet to record an agent run with redline for a given framework.

framework.description: The agent framework the user is working with
